title: Sing “Yesterday” for Me
description:
After graduating from college, Rikuo Uozumi finds himself struggling with uncertainty about his future while working part-time at a convenience store and drifting through an unmotivated daily life. Still unable to move on from his feelings for his former classmate and teacher Shinako Morinome, Rikuo quietly accepts the loneliness and confusion that come with adulthood. His ordinary routine begins to change after meeting Haru Nonaka, an eccentric and energetic girl who often appears alongside her pet crow and openly expresses interest in him.

As complicated emotions and unresolved feelings begin connecting the lives of Rikuo, Haru, Shinako, and those around them, each character struggles to confront regret, love, and the fear of moving forward. Through quiet conversations, emotional moments, and realistic relationships, Sing “Yesterday” for Me explores the uncertainty of adulthood and the difficulty of finding purpose, happiness, and genuine connection in everyday life.
